nodes.name: contributor-license-agreement.txt
nodes.summary: Contributor License Agreement (CLA) text requiring contributors to grant RisingWave Labs rights to use, distribute, and sublicense their contributions.

nodes.name: dependabot.yml
nodes.summary: Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates across Cargo (Rust), npm (JavaScript), pip (Python), GitHub Actions, and Docker ecosystems with weekly or monthly schedules.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers multiple package ecosystems (cargo, npm, pip, github-actions, docker) in a single config file.

nodes.name: labeler.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub pull request auto-labeler configuration mapping changed file paths to PR labels, covering all major source directories (frontend, stream, storage, meta, connector, etc.).

nodes.name: pr-title-checker-config.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for the PR title checker action, defining label-based validation rules and error messages for pull request titles.

nodes.name: pull_request_template.md
nodes.summary: GitHub pull request template guiding contributors to describe their changes, link related issues, and complete a checklist covering tests, documentation, and breaking-change assessment.

nodes.name: semantic.yml
nodes.summary: Semantic PR configuration enabling revert commits to bypass conventional-commit title validation.
